name: dream-team-for-microsoft-scout
displayName: The Dream Team for Microsoft Scout
author: Shervin Shaffie
description: A local-first command center and a composable team of eight digital employees for Microsoft Scout. Runs entirely on your own machine on Scout-native tools; sign in with Microsoft to optionally unlock extra internal depth skills. Add or remove your own employees. Includes the app, the orchestrator and setup skills, the background automations, and a guided setup wizard with a setup doctor.

requires.m365SignIn: recommended (the team works best when signed into your own Microsoft 365)

app.runtime: Python standard library only (no pip install)

privacy: Local-only. Contains none of the author's (or anyone else's) personal data. Enforced by verify-clean.ps1, which fails the build on any personal identifier or email address.
note: Author attribution is provenance metadata and is not shown in the app UI.

baseline.runsOn: The two bundled skills (daily-flow-team, daily-flow-setup) + Scout built-in skills (docx, pptx, xlsx, excalidraw, web-artifacts) + WorkIQ for your own email/Teams/calendar/OneDrive.
baseline.capability: Full eight-employee team: inbox triage and replies, meeting prep and notes-to-actions, research with citations, scheduling, document/deck/sheet/diagram creation, dashboards, the approval inbox, trust levels, and the always-on automations.

microsoftUpgrade.appliesTo: Microsoft employees who sign in during setup
microsoftUpgrade.mechanism: The setup wizard detects a Microsoft sign-in automatically and offers to add optional internal depth skills into your own Scout. Nothing internal ships inside this package; depth content is only ever fetched into the signed-in user's machine.
microsoftUpgrade.deepens: Mainly Dash and Drew (richer reporting, branded content, seller-data depth).

model.note: Wizard lists the user's available models at runtime; falls back to the best available if Opus 4.8 is absent.
